summary: Comprehensive testing of manual reservation feature for Kaisō Sushi admin panel. All backend APIs and frontend UI flows tested and working correctly.

known_hydration_warnings.issue: React hydration warning: tr cannot be child of span, span cannot be child of tbody - caused by Emergent visual editor wrapper spans
known_hydration_warnings.note: Does NOT affect functionality - cosmetic warning only

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - creates manual reservation with source='manual'
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - requires HTTP Basic Auth (admin/reservas)
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - returns 401 without auth
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - returns 401 with wrong credentials
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - name and phone are required (422 if missing)
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - email is optional (works without, works with)
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - observations are saved correctly
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - bypasses Monday closed rule (availability checks)
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - bypasses time slot validation (accepts 18:37)
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - name min length validation (2+ chars required)
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - phone min length validation (9+ chars required)
✅ POST /api/admin/reservations - guests max validation (max 12)
✅ GET /api/admin/reservations - returns manual reservations with source='manual'
✅ GET /api/admin/reservations - returns online reservations with source='online'
✅ Admin login with admin/reservas credentials
✅ 'Nueva Reserva' button opens manual reservation form
✅ Manual reservation form has all required fields with data-testid attributes
✅ Form submission creates reservation and closes form
✅ New reservation appears in table after creation
✅ 'Origen' column shows 'MANUAL' badge (blue) for manual reservations
✅ 'Origen' column shows 'Online' text for online reservations
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test reservations via backend tests (TEST_Manual_*, TEST_Online_Source) and UI test (TEST_UI_Manual) for 2026-03-17
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual reservation feature fully tested. Backend endpoint POST /api/admin/reservations creates reservations with source='manual', bypasses availability checks, requires auth. Frontend form opens via 'Nueva Reserva' button, has proper data-testid attributes, submits correctly. 'Origen' column differentiates Manual vs Online reservations. All features working as per requirements.

feature_verification_summary.POST /api/admin/reservations: WORKING - creates manual reservation with source='manual', bypasses checks
feature_verification_summary.Auth requirement: WORKING - returns 401 without valid admin credentials
feature_verification_summary.Optional email field: WORKING - creates reservation with or without email
feature_verification_summary.GET /api/admin/reservations source field: WORKING - returns source field for all reservations
feature_verification_summary.Manual reservation form: WORKING - all fields have data-testid, form submits correctly
